questions.question: Describe the primary purpose of a storyboard in the design thinking process. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A storyboard is a visual representation of a sequence of events or user interactions.

questions.question: What is the main benefit of creating a storyboard before prototyping, and why is it an essential step in the design thinking process? (10 marks)
questions.hint: A storyboard allows designers to test and refine their ideas before investing time and resources into building a prototype.

questions.question: A designer has been asked to create a storyboard for a new mobile app. The app is designed to help users track their daily steps and rewards. What elements would you include in the storyboard to effectively communicate the user journey? (10 marks)
questions.hint: The storyboard should include key user interactions, such as logging in, setting goals, tracking steps, and redeeming rewards.
